title: Expose cadence scheduler state in human visibility outputs
description: TASK-004 established runtime-backed cadence execution and a real GitHub Actions scheduler binding. The next gap is human visibility: operators should be able to see cadence timing, dispatch state, and scheduler profile through the existing visibility contract without reading raw .aof artifacts.
triage_notes: Cadence timing, dispatch state, and scheduler profile are now expressible through the existing visibility contract and rendered by visibility-serve.
